summary: DeliveryMap Component Testing - All features working. New react-map-gl (MapLibre fork) map component at /map-demo renders correctly with 55 stops as WebGL circle markers, route line as LineString, GPS simulation with camera follow, and all control buttons functional. Backend APIs (/api/stops, /api/directions, /api/map-test) all return 200. Main app at / also loads correctly with 55 stops in sidebar.

tests.name: GET /api/stops returns 200
tests.detail: Returns list of 55 stops with required fields (id, latitude, longitude, order, address)

tests.name: GET /api/directions returns 200
tests.detail: Returns route geometry as LineString with 1002 coordinate points

tests.name: GET /api/map-test returns HTML
tests.detail: Returns standalone HTML test page with MapLibre

tests.name: DeliveryMap renders on /map-demo
tests.detail: Map loads with MapLibre tiles, 55 stops visible as numbered circles

tests.name: Route line renders as LineString
tests.detail: Blue route line connects all stops

tests.name: Simulate GPS button works
tests.detail: Starts GPS simulation, button changes to 'Stop Sim'

tests.name: Follow mode tracks driver
tests.detail: Camera follows driver position with 3D perspective (pitch: 65°)

tests.name: Fit Route button works
tests.detail: Fits camera to show all stops

issues: Font loading warning: 'Open Sans Bold' 404 from openfreemap.org - map renders with local fallback fonts (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: DeliveryMap component correctly uses WebGL layers (no HTML Markers) - follows guideline #1
Uncontrolled camera state via mapRef with jumpTo/flyTo - follows guideline #2
Fixed stop IDs in GeoJSON (feature.id === stop.id) - follows guideline #3
No multiplier badges on map (only in UI cards) - follows guideline #4
Route line as single LineString source/layer - follows guideline #5
GPS simulation moves along route at 500ms intervals skipping every 3 points
Camera follow uses mapRef.current.jumpTo() from useEffect on driverLocation changes
Console warning 'Expected value to be of type number, but found null' - likely from initial render before data loads (non-blocking)
test_credentials: DEV_MODE=True uses dev-user-123, no credentials needed
context_for_next_testing_agent: DeliveryMap component at /app/frontend/src/components/DeliveryMap.tsx fully functional. Demo page at /map-demo works with all features: 55 stops as WebGL circles, route line, GPS simulation, camera follow, fit route. Backend APIs /api/stops, /api/directions, /api/map-test all working. Main app at / also loads correctly. Minor font loading warning from openfreemap.org (non-blocking, uses local fallback).

key_findings.deliverymap_component: Working - renders with react-map-gl v8.1.0 + maplibre-gl v5.22.0
key_findings.stops_rendering: Working - 55 stops as numbered WebGL circle markers
key_findings.route_line: Working - blue LineString with 1002 coordinate points
key_findings.gps_simulation: Working - moves driver puck along route at 500ms intervals
key_findings.camera_follow: Working - jumpTo with pitch:65° and bearing based on heading
key_findings.fit_route: Working - fitBounds to show all stops
key_findings.main_app: Working - loads at / with 55 stops in sidebar

mocked_apis_list: Authentication is MOCKED via DEV_MODE env var (dev-user-123)

performance_guidelines_compliance.guideline_1_webgl_only: PASS - Uses <Layer type='circle'> and <Layer type='symbol'>, no HTML Markers
performance_guidelines_compliance.guideline_2_uncontrolled_camera: PASS - MapLibre owns viewport, programmatic moves via mapRef.jumpTo/flyTo
performance_guidelines_compliance.guideline_4_no_multiplier_badges: PASS - x5 grouping only in UI stop cards, not on map
performance_guidelines_compliance.guideline_5_single_route_line: PASS - Single stable <Source>/<Layer type='line'>, data prop swaps only
